title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Click on the back arrow button in the top left corner.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the previous screen.

title: Click on a fruit image in the 3x3 grid
test_steps: Click on one of the fruit images in the 3x3 grid.
expected_result: The selected fruit image should be highlighted or marked as selected.

title: Click on the large watermelon slice image
test_steps: Click on the large watermelon slice image.
expected_result: The large watermelon slice image should be highlighted or marked as selected.

title: Click on the navigation bar buttons
test_steps: Click on the back button in the navigation bar. | Click on the home button in the navigation bar. | Click on the recent apps button in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The user should be redirected to the previous screen. | The user should be redirected to the home screen. | The user should be redirected to the recent apps screen.

title: Check for accessibility/usability
test_steps: Perform a screen reader test on the back arrow button. | Perform a screen reader test on the large watermelon slice image. | Perform a screen reader test on the 3x3 grid of fruit images. | Perform a screen reader test on the navigation bar buttons.
expected_result: The back arrow button should be accessible and readable. | The large watermelon slice image should be accessible and readable. | The 3x3 grid of fruit images should be accessible and readable. | The navigation bar buttons should be accessible and readable.
